acceptance_criteria.text: Retry-created refresh jobs preserve source job lineage.
proof: request_refresh_retry passes retry_source_queue_id and retry metadata into enqueue_paid_operator_map_refresh.

acceptance_criteria.text: Operator UI shows retry-created jobs as linked attempts and checks the new job immediately.
proof: OperatorPage renders Повтор от job ... from job/billing retry_source_queue_id.
requestRefreshRetry calls checkRefreshResult(result.new_queue_id) after a queued retry.

acceptance_criteria.text: No provider writes or old-job mutation are introduced.
proof: Sprint 44 stores lineage only in new reservation metadata.
Existing retry tests still assert the source queue is not updated and external_writes_performed is false.

acceptance_criteria.text: Targeted backend tests, frontend build, and diff check pass.
proof: py_compile passed for refresh services and Operator API.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: python3 -m py_compile src/services/operator_map_refresh.py src/services/operator_refresh_retry.py src/services/operator_refresh_result.py src/api/operator_api.py
PYTHONPATH=src:. python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_operator_refresh_retry.py tests/test_operator_refresh_result.py tests/test_operator_map_refresh.py
known_gaps: No live paid retry was triggered because that would create a real reservation/job.
